name: Allen Lcountymeadowbrook Park
description: Allen Lcountymeadowbrook Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Iola, KS. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: LaHarpe City building
description: Come play pickleball at LaHarpe City building in La Harpe, KS! There are 2 outdoor courts. You’ll need to create your own lines and bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Meadowbrook Park
description: Meadowbrook Park is a place to play pickleball in Iola, KS. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.
